purpose: Establish a fail-closed multilingual platform/agro gold-set, question-coverage and expert-review authority without fabricated approvals or model-quality claims.
forbiddenCapabilities: runtime model, retrieval, tool or database change
acceptance: all 12 current TAI roles have RU/EN/ZH cases
all 23 current canonical deal states have RU/EN/ZH cases
all eight governed agro topics have RU/EN/ZH cases
typo, transliteration, ambiguity and adversarial variants are present
every case is covered exactly once by authority, freshness and abstention policy
case and corpus digests fail closed on mutation
empty review evidence yields PENDING_REVIEW rather than PASS
real critical acceptance requires two independent reviewers
